calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: No opposition was filed, and the motion is granted, including sanctions in the sum of $350.00 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Responses are due within 15 calendar days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to prepare order. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW. NOT REPORTED
